raw_consumer_statement:
CFPB Complaint Narrative I am filing a complaint against XXXX  XXXX XXXX XXXX regarding an unresolved billing dispute involving a returned purchase from XXXX XXXX XXXX 
On XX/XX/XXXX, I purchased cookware from XXXX XXXX XXXX ( XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX, XXXX ) using my XXXX  XXXX ending in XXXX. I returned the merchandise on XX/XX/XXXX, in original condition. Store employees confirmed that the refund would be issued back to my credit card. 
I never received the refund. 
On XX/XX/XXXX, I returned to the store and spoke with a manager ( XXXX XXXX. ), who provided documentation showing that the refund was processed. However, the documentation clearly shows that the refund was issued to the wrong credit card belonging to another customer, not mine. 
I disputed the charge with XXXX. They initially issued a temporary credit of {$180.00}, but later reversed it and reapplied the charge to my account. Despite providing documentation proving the refund was misapplied to a third party, XXXX  has refused to correct the error and stated there is nothing further they can do. 
This is a billing error. I returned the merchandise, and the merchant issued a refund incorrectly to another customer. Barclays has failed to properly investigate and resolve the dispute, leaving me responsible for a charge that should have been credited. 
What I am seeking : Immediate credit of {$180.00} to my account Correction of this billing error A proper investigation into the handling of this dispute Company Information : Credit Card Company : XXXX  XXXX XXXX XXXX Account : Ending in XXXX Merchant : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX : XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX Consumer Information : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX Phone : XXXX Email : XXXX Additional information provided by consumer : XXXX Consumer wants to make sure this is being sent to XXXX XXXX XXXX
